creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the patch Daniel, could we make the following changes so all the variables are in their sections?

# USES block
USES
+USE_GITHUB
USE_LDCONFIG
-USE_GITHUB

# USES=shebangfix related variables
SHEBANG_FILES

# USES=meson related variables
+MESON_ARGS

# WRKSRC block
WRKSRC_SUBDIR

-MESON_ARGS

Thanks!
